$comment: Leadership contract schemas for BOX provider outputs. Used by src/core/trust_boundary.js. Bump schemaVersion on any breaking field change.

planner.$comment: Prometheus planner output contract. Required fields that MUST be present and valid before downstream execution.

plans.description: Array of worker plan objects; each must have role, task, priority, wave, verification

approved.description: Whether the plan is approved for execution

corrections.description: List of mandatory corrections before execution

decision.description: Strategic decision for the current cycle

wakeAthena.description: Whether Athena should be activated this cycle

callPrometheus.description: Whether Prometheus deep analysis should be triggered

briefForPrometheus.description: Instructions for Prometheus on what to analyze and plan

expectedOutcome.description: Expected-vs-realized calibration forecast. Attached by jesus_supervisor after AI decision. Used to measure strategic decision quality across cycles.

expectedSystemHealthAfter.description: Predicted system health state after executing this directive

expectedNextDecision.description: Predicted decision type Jesus will make in the following cycle

expectedAthenaActivated.description: Whether Athena is expected to execute work this cycle

expectedPrometheusRan.description: Whether Prometheus is expected to produce a fresh analysis this cycle

expectedWorkItemCount.description: Number of work items commanded in this directive
